title: Sh@lumiy'el #8017
definition:
Shelumiel = "friend of God"

 1) son of Zurishaddai and prince of the tribe of Simeon at the time
    of the exodus
nasbUsage:
Definition: Shelumiel = "friend of God"

 1) son of Zurishaddai and prince of the tribe of Simeon at the time
    of the exodus

    NASB:  peace of God, a Simeonite
